description.ko: 사막 분지의 소금 평원과 광물 매장지의 복잡한 질감을 수직 부감 시점으로 보여주는 고해상도 위성 스타일의 지구 표면 이미지입니다.
description.en: A high-resolution satellite-style capture of the Earth's surface, showcasing the intricate textures of salt flats and mineral deposits in a desert basin from a top-down perspective.

prompt: Cinematic drone shot, top-down aerial view of Earth's crust, intricate geological textures, abstract natural patterns, crystalline salt flats meeting mineral-rich red earth, vibrant turquoise water veins, hyper-realistic detail, 8k resolution, satellite photography style, high contrast lighting, TERRA-1 aesthetic.
